mapper.select: select attachment_id, record_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, attachment_tag, create_time, create_by from osg_class_record_attachment where record_id = #{recordId} order by create_time asc
mapper.insert:
insert into osg_class_record_attachment ( record_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, attachment_tag, create_time, create_by ) values
(#{item.recordId}, #{item.fileName}, #{item.filePath}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.fileType}, #{item.attachmentTag}, sysdate(), #{item.createBy})
